docket_entries.description: DECLARATION BY JAMES ADES RE REQUEST TO APPEAR AT HEARING BY TELEPHONE. FILED BY PLAINTIFF ADES, JAMES
ORDER RE REQUEST TO APPEAR AT HEARING BY TELEPHONE BY PLAINTIFF. THR REQUEST IS GRANTED.

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAR-27-2019. PLAINTIFF PRESENT VIA COURTCALL AND WITHOUT PROOF OF SERVICE. AT PLAINTIFF'S REQUEST THE COURT CONTINUED THE MATTER TO MAY-30-2019 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506 FOR PROOF OF SERVICE. JUDGE JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK S. RAVINANTAPRICHA. NOT REPORTED.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF ADES, JAMES IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT TORRES, JOSE BREWSTER, DAVID CLAIM FOR RETURN OF SECURITY DEPOSIT BARRED BY RES JUDICATA. THIS ISSUE WAS RESOLVED BY JUDGMENT ENTERED BY COURT IN CUD-17-660171 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
